---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Obsidian Writing Studio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or Workflow Gap

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the gap in your writing workflow. Be specific — a clear problem statement helps evaluate whether this fits the project's scope.

Example: *When compiling a project for export, there is no way to exclude notes-only binder items automatically. I have to toggle each one off manually every time.*

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior or feature you would like to see. Include where it would live in the UI (Launcher, Binder, Settings, context menu, command palette, etc.) and how a user would interact with it.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workarounds or alternative approaches you have already tried or considered, and why they are insufficient.

---

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, references to similar features in other writing tools, or any other information that supports the request.
